title: White House Tells Congo’s Soccer Team to Isolate, Citing Ebola Outbreak
summary_full: The team, now in Belgium, must isolate there for 21 days or risk being denied permission to come to Houston for the World Cup, an official said.
summary_public: The team, now in Belgium, must isolate there for 21 days or risk being denied permission to come to Houston for the World Cup, an official said.
